members.notes: Founder seat. rappid + seed_url get filled in when kody-w's brainstem first subscribes via `brainstem join`.
External-collaborator test seat — proves the cross-org / outside-user case before Bill is invited.

reconciliation.notes: members.json is a cache. The canonical roster is `GET /repos/<owner>/<repo>/collaborators`. Brainstems running neighborhood_subscribe_agent.py reconcile this file with the live API and open a PR when they drift.
